docTitle: Muma kuom Ramani · Muma e Ndiko Achiel
metaDesc: Luw kit ndalo mag Muma Machon, ngima Yesu, kod wuodhe mag Paulo e ramani madier — Muma notimore e kuonde madiera.

s.title: Muma kuom Ramani
s.verse: “Kane wanyisou kaka Ruodhwa Yesu Kristo biro gi duong’ maler, to ne ok wakonyore gi sigendini ma dhano ochuogo, to wan wawegi ne wanene gi wang’wa, ka en gi duong’ne maler duto.” (2 Petro 1:16)
s.purpose: Muma ok en sigana mar miriambo. En ndiko mar ji mane owuotho e kuonde, ndalo, kod nying madiera. Luw yorni e ramani, kaluwore gi kit ndalo — mul kanyo, kata di ▶ mondo iwuoth e iye line ka line.
s.ot_kick: ① Muma Machon — kaluwore gi ndalo
s.ot_lead: Ok en wuoth achiel kende to en mol mar sigana mar warruok chakre chuech kadhi nyime: chuech kod podho → ataro kod Babel → luong (Ibrahim) → piny mosingi → Wuok → thim → loyo → pinyruoth → pogruok → twech → dwogo.
s.je_lead: Luw ngima Yesu kaka Injili nyiso, kaluwore gi kit ndalo — chakre nywolne e Bethlehem kalo e batiso kod tich e Galili, kakalo Samaria, nyaka msalaba, chier kod idh polo e Jerusalem.
s.pa_kick: ③ Muma Manyien — wuodhe mag Paulo
s.pa_h: Chakre Antiokia nyaka tung’ piny — Rumi
s.pa_lead: Chakre Pentekost e Jerusalem, kaka Wach Maber nolandore kakalo Judea — kakalo Asia Matin kod Yurop nyaka chuny pinyruoth. Yier achiel kuom wuodhe abich (mokwongo·mar ariyo·mar adek + wuoth mar dhi Rumi + bang’ gony) kendo luw gik motimore e Tich Joote gi baruwa mane ondiki e yo.
s.foot: Sokni · Kuonde luwore gi ndiko mar Muma kod kido mar piny mar Muma (gi nying machon ka konyo). Dho nam, aore kod ataro ogol e weche mag piny mayawore (Natural Earth), modwoko mayot.

eden.name: Eden (Chuech · Podho)
eden.note: E piny mane ochwe «ber ahinya,» richo donjo mi oketho winjruok e kind Nyasaye gi dhano.
events: Chuech e ndalo auchiel — «ne ber ahinya»
Dhano ochwe e kit Nyasaye
Podho, kod gol e Eden
Singruok mokwongo mar Wach Maber — «koth dhako nonyon wi thuol»

noah.name: Ararat (Ataro)
noah.today: Got Ararat, milambo wuok chieng’ mar Turkey kawuono
noah.note: Nyasaye ng’ado bura ne piny mopong’ gi richo, to orito ngima kuom anywola achiel.
events: Piny mopong’ gi timbe maricho
Ataro, kod yie mar Nuh
Singruok mar lihudu — «ataro ok nochak otiek piny kendo»

babel.name: Kar Gedo mar Babel
babel.note: Kuom sunga mochomo polo, Nyasaye keyo dhokgi kod ji e wang’ piny duto.
events: «Wager dala kod ot maboro… mondo wami nyingwa duong’»
Nyasaye nuko dhokgi
Ji okere e wang’ piny (Shinar — bang’e Babulon)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Sigana mar warruok mar Muma chakore gi luong mar ng’at achiel.
events: Nyasaye luongo Abram oa Ur mar jo-Kaldea
«Analoki oganda maduong’… ogendini duto noyud gueth kuomi»
Kuom yie owuok oweyo pinygi

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: E yo, kodwoko luong mochomo piny mosingi.
events: Anywola Tera dak Haran
Tera tho
Abram chako wuoth mochomo Kanaan ka en gi higni 75

shechem.name: Shekem · Kanaan
shechem.note: E piny mosingi anywola ochakore kendo singruok kalore e tienge.
events: Donjo Kanaan, kendo mar misango mokwongo — «koth ema namiye pinyni»
Singruok (Chak 15) · Isaka · Jakobo
Yawuot Jakobo apar gariyo — tiend dhoudi apar gariyo

egypt.name: Misri (Goshen)
egypt.note: Anywola doko oganda maduong’ — bang’e oganda mar wasumbni.
events: Josef, mane oloki, oidho nyaka obedo jaloch e Misri
Anywola Jakobo duto olor mondo otony e kech
Oganda mar Israel mamedore odoko wasumbni

sinai.name: Got Sinai
sinai.note: Warruok maduong’ mar Muma Machon — wasumbni doko jo-Nyasaye owuon.
events: Masiche apar kod nyaromb Pasaka
Nam Makwar opogore mi ging’ado
Chike Apar, Chik, Hema mar Lemo kod misengini

kadesh.name: Kadesh (thim)
kadesh.note: Tamruok yie omiyo tieng’ achiel bayo piny — to Nyasaye osiko kodgi.
events: Jonon piny apar gariyo — to ji odagi yie
Higni 38 e thim — manna, bor polo kod mach
E paw Moab, twak mogik mar Musa (Rapar mar Chik)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Giko gidonjo mi gikawo piny mosingi.
events: Jordan opogore mi ji ong’ado
Ohinga mag Jeriko opodho
Loyo Kanaan kod pogo piny

shiloh.name: Shilo (Jong’ad Bura)
shiloh.note: Ka onge ruoth, ng’ato ka ng’ato timo gima ohero — dwarore ruoth madier.
events: Hema mar Lemo ochung’ Shilo
Lwet richo–sand–warruok (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Ruth — bedo ja-adiera e ndalo mag mudho, e koth Daudi

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Pinyruoth Moriw
jerusalem.note: Kinde maber mar Israel — kod singruok mar ruoth ma ok rum.
events: Saulo ruoth mokwongo, eka Daudi gi Goliath
Singruok gi Daudi — «lochni nosik nyaka chieng’» (2 Sam 7)
Solomon gero Hekalu e Jerusalem

samaria.name: Samaria · Pinyruoth Mopogore
samaria.note: Pinyruoth opogore kendo odok chien ka jonabi ywak.
events: Bang’ Solomon, pogruok e Juda gi Israel
Lamo nyiseche manono mosiko
Elija, Isaya, Jeremia ywak ‘dwoguru’ — kendo hulo Mesia

nineveh.name: Nineveh (Asuria)
nineveh.note: Kokwedo siem duto, nyandwat ema opodho mokwongo.
events: Nineveh, dala maduong’ mar Asuria
Pinyruoth nyandwat opodho e lwet Asuria (722 K.K.)
Jona iore Nineveh

babylon.name: Babulon
babylon.note: Otieno mar mudho moloyo — to singruok mar warruok pod nitie.
events: Jerusalem opodho, Hekalu owang’ (586 K.K.)
Juda otero Babulon
Daniel gi Ezekiel — yie kod fweny e twech

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Kata e chuny pinyruoth mapagano, Nyasaye rito joge.
events: Persia loyo Babulon
Esta reso jo-Yahudi e tho
Nehemia lemo e nyim ruoth mi iore

return.name: Dwogo Jerusalem
return.note: Gidwogo mi gigero — to onge ruoth mosebiro. Girito Mesia.
events: Mbaka adek mag dwogo kuom chik Sairas (Zerubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nehemia 444)
Hekalu ogedi kendo ohinga mag Jerusalem oloki
Malaki — Muma Machon tieko: «Abiro oro jaotena»

bethlehem.name: Bethlehem
bethlehem.note: Mesia mosingi obiro e dala mar Daudi — Wach modoko dhano.
events: Onywole Bethlehem, dala mar Daudi
Malaike land wachno ne jokwath
Jorieko biro mondo olame

nazareth.name: Nazareth
nazareth.note: Nyasaye dongo kaka dhano e dala mapile.
events: Opidhe e od japecho
Ka en gi higni apar gariyo, openjo kendo odwoko e Hekalu
Bang’e odage e sunagogi mar dalagi owuon

jordan.name: Aora Jordan
jordan.note: Tichne lela chakore — polo nyiso ni en Wuowi.
events: Johana batise
Roho lor ka akuru — «Ma e Wuoda mahero»
Oloyo tembe adek mag Setan e thim

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: E hono mare mokwongo onyiso duong’ne.
events: Welo e arus
Pi olok divai — honone mokwongo
Jopuonjrene oyie kuome

sychar.name: Sukar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Yor tich mokwongo — kakalo Jerusalem nyaka Samaria mochaki.
events: Opwodho Hekalu e Jerusalem
Gotieno, Nikodemo — «Nyaka nyuoli kendo»
Pi ngima ne dhako ma ja-Samaria

capernaum.name: Kapernaum
capernaum.note: Kar tich mar Galili — luong, puonj kod akwed duto romoe ka.
events: Oluongo jolupo kendo oketo kae kar tich
Twak mawuok e got — «Ogwedh joma odhier e chuny»
Ngeche mag pinyruoth — kod akwed mamedore

galilee.name: Nam Galili
galilee.note: Gi teko ewi chuech onyiso ng’a ma en.
events: «Ling’ thi» — okweyo ahiti
Opidho ji 5,000 gi makate abich kod rech ariyo
Owuotho ewi pi

caesarea_p.name: Kaisaria Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Jopuonjre fwenyo ni en Kristo, kendo yor msalaba yawore.
events: Hulo mar Petro — «In e Kristo, Wuod Nyasaye mangima»
Okor tho gi chierne mokwongo
Olokore e duong’ ewi got

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: E yo modhi malo Jerusalem, omanyo ji molal.
events: Omiyo Bartimayo muofu neno
Oluongo Zakayo jasol osuru
«Wuod Dhano nobiro mondo omany kendo ores joma olal»

bethany.name: Bethania
bethany.note: Onyiso loch ewi tho machiegni gi juma mare mogik.
events: Ochiero Lazaro koa e bur — «An e chier kod ngima»
Maria olwoko bende ne iko mar yiko
Hononi miyo chenro mar nege medore

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Giko ma Muma duto ochomo — msalaba, chier, idh polo.
events: Donjo gi duong’; oloko mesni mag Hekalu kendo
E Sap Ngima Mogik olwoko tiende jopuonjre
Otho e msalaba
Ochier e odiechieng’ mar adek, eka oidho polo

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Kanisa moro mochako kendo mochopo tich mar joma ok jo-Yahudi.
events: E lamo Roho opogo Barnaba gi Saulo
Kanisa kama joyie nokuong luongoe ni ‘jo-Kristo’
Kar chakruok mar wuoth mokwongo, mar ariyo kod mar adek

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Wath mar Antiokia — gikwang’ gidhi Saipras.

salamis.name: Salami (Saipras)
salamis.note: Kar chungruok mokwongo e Saipras — kalando e sunagogi.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Teko onyisore ne joma kwedo Wach Maber.
events: Elima jajuok ogo muofu
Sergio Paulo, ruoth mar gweng’, oyie
Chakre ka ‘Paulo’ ema otelo

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Wath e Pamfilia — ka ema Johana Mariko odok chien.

pantioch.name: Antiokia mar Pisidia
pantioch.note: Wach Maber yawore mochomo joma ok jo-Yahudi.
events: Twak maboro mar sigana mar warruok e sunagogi
Joma ok jo-Yahudi mang’eny mor mi orwako wachno
Iriembe oko kuom akwed

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Ji mang’eny oyie, to sand chunogi mondo gidhi nyime.

lystra.name: Lustra
lystra.note: Iluonge ni nyasaye, eka ochiele gi kite.
events: Ochango ng’at mane rang’ol nyaka nywolne
Oganda temo timonigi misango ka gima gin nyiseche
Ochiele gi kite mi owe ka gima otho, to ochung’ malo

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Jopuonjre mang’eny olos; gidok ka giteko kanise.

troas.name: Troa
troas.note: Kar lokruok kama Wach Maber okuong chomoe Yurop.
events: Fweny mar ng’at ma ja-Makedonia
«Bi Makedonia ikonywa»
Gikalo piyo gidhi Yurop

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Kanisa mokwongo mar Yurop — Wach Maber loyo kata e od twech.
events: Lidia, ja-ohala mar law makwar, oyie
Nyako misumba ma ja-koro ogony
Wende mag otieno, yiengni mar piny, anywola mar jarit od twech owar

thess.name: Thesalonika
thess.note: Wach yiengo dala kendo akwed wuok matek.
events: Owuoyo e sunagogi sabato adek
«Jogi maseloko piny duto»
Gia gotieno ling’-ling’

berea.name: Beroya
berea.note: Joma ‘oluor’ mane onono Wach kendgi giwegi.
events: Girwako Wach gi mor
Pile ka pile ginono Ndiko mondo gine ka en kamano
Ji mang’eny oyie

athens.name: Athene
athens.note: E dala mar jorieko olando ‘nyasaye ma ok ong’ere’.
events: Iye chandore koneno dala mopong’ gi nyiseche manono
Ewi Areopago olando Jachuech kod chier
Ijare, to ji manok oyie

corinth.name: Korintho
corinth.note: Odak higa achiel gi nus, kogero kanisa e dala mar timbe maricho.
events: Otimo hembe gi Akwila kod Priskila
«Kik iluor… nikech an kodi»
Jo-Korintho mang’eny oyie kendo obatisi

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Chuny wuoth mar adek — Wach landore e Asia duto.
events: Puonj pile kuom higni ariyo e od Turano
Buge mag juok owang’; tije madongo
Demetrio ja-theth fedha chako koko

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Goyo oriti gi pi wang’ ne jodongo mag Efeso.
events: «Riteuru kanisa mane ong’iewo gi rembe owuon»
Jodongo ywak, kang’eyo ni ok gibi nene kendo

caesarea.name: Kaisaria
caesarea.note: Kuom higni ariyo orito Wach Maber e nyim jotelo kod ruoth.
events: Bura e nyim jotelo Feliks kod Festo
Chwakne e nyim Ruoth Agripa
«Aywak ne Kaisar» — odhi Rumi

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Imake e Hekalu, kendo yorne kaka ng’at motwe chakore.
events: Oganda make e Hekalu
Ochwakore e nyim buch jodongo
Kaka ja-Rumi, iore e bwo jarit nyaka Kaisaria

myra.name: Mura
myra.note: Gilokore e yie mar Aleksandria modhi Rumi.

fairhaven.name: Wath Mabeyo (Krete)
fairhaven.note: Siem mar Paulo mar weyo kwang’ ok owinj.

crete.name: Krete
crete.note: Bang’ gonye, chula kama oweyo Tito mondo olos kanise.
events: Oweyo Tito mondo oyier jodongo e dala ka dala
Oluongo jotelo ma onge ketho kendo jo-adiera
Ondiko barua ne Tito

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Kuom ahiti kod kethruok mar yie, singruok mar Nyasaye ochung’.
events: Yamb ‘nyandwat-wuok chieng’’ oketho yie, to ji 276 duto otony
Thuol okaye, to ok ohinyore
Ochango joma tuo e chula

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Gichopo Italia kendo joyie wetegi orwakogi.

rome.name: Rumi
rome.book: Tich Joote 28 · Baruwa mag Twech · 2 Timotheo
rome.note: Wach Maber ochopo chuny pinyruoth giko — ok en giko to en chakruok.
events: Higni ariyo e twech mar ot, kolando pinyruoth gi chir
Ka ema ondikoe Baruwa mag Twech (Efe·Fil·Kol·Flm)
Bang’e otwe kendo, ondiko 2 Timotheo mi onege — «Asekedo lweny maber, asetieko ng’wech»
